title: Sharowing's Better Dungeons
description: A mod that rethinks what the dungeons could have been if 1.21 was a dungeon update?
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/179657f39395fbf254082ae03b7a4c4df3165e25.png)
![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea380c20cedf132a48d771e68606c0df2409968a.png)

# **THIS MOD ADDS :**
- A **new structure**
- A **new type of material**
- And **Quality Of Life Tools**

And **a bit more.**
Basicly Adding Dungeon based trial chambers while keeping the essence of the dungeon.             

**(Vanilla Dungeons still exist)**



![ancient dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c64a9a6e3d383c34dc481a961dcedd37e0c954b.png)

**Photos :**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![a dungeon hall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61ea11a8b38e093c855d9a96efc9a9f9017b80b5.png)
![a room in the dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bc659e8bbcc729c9f69270e178303b7c385e11d.png)
![main room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85de157a70824b381a6d66dff409948021f2662.png)

</details>

With this new **_Ancient_** Makeover **the dungeon is randomly generated** and much larger.
making it a sight just to explore,

but also to battle since now you can find ancient spawners throughout the entire structure. that on right click summons a lot of undead.

that after killing the spawner will drop a ancient key that can be used by right clicking the ancient vault that took its place. that once used spews out a random assortment of items.

![itms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26bb82585fa85b58362e3bf91e9db03b04e7b1d7.png)

- **ANCIENT ALLOY** : 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  ![slloy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef4fdf0b3a889c561a627aaa2013131a6c706a2a.png)
  ![alloy armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa27564f609dfdf018a6034afda9508463c87a4.png)

</details>


  A new material that is droped in its ingot and raw forms by the vaults. with the alloy tools, armor, and weapons being on tier with netherite, it is quite useful to seek these out.
- **QOL Tools** :
   1. **Giant Blazing Ancient Key** - a giant version of the key you used to open the vaults it is able to launch you into the air or stright into the ground depending if you are crouching or not.

   2. **Soul Light** - A soul flame light that when used gives you night vision and haste for ten minutes, but it **only** has **6 durability** so be careful!

   3. **Tunnel Borer** -  A Buffed up ancient shovel that with **right click** can break **ANYTHING** (excluding unbreakable blocks) **INSTANTLY** but it uses **5 durability** instead of one.
